description_long: This obelisk is a concrete monument composed of three vertical rectangular pillars of varying heights, arranged in a semi-circular formation. The tallest pillar is centrally positioned and topped with a metallic five-pointed star, adding a distinctive decorative element. Two large dark plaques with inscriptions are mounted on the front faces of the pillars, likely commemorating individuals or events. The surface of the obelisk is weathered, with visible stains and signs of aging, giving it a historical and solemn appearance. The base is circular, bordered by a ring of stones, and surrounded by a patch of mossy, grassy ground. The overall structure is robust and immovable, designed to serve as a public memorial in an urban park or square.
description: A weathered concrete obelisk with three pillars, topped by a metal star and featuring inscribed plaques, set on a circular stone-bordered base with mossy ground.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main plaques with inscriptions and the central pillar topped by a star.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the engraved year '1941' and a second large plaque, with the star visible atop the tallest pillar.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain backs of the pillars and the star at the top, with no plaques visible.
description_view_3: Back-side view highlighting the staggered heights of the pillars and the weathered concrete surfaces.
attribute_inscription: Two large plaques with inscribed text are mounted on the front and side pillars; inscriptions appear to be in a Latin-based script, possibly commemorative names and dates, with moderate legibility due to weathering.
attribute_ornamentation: A metallic five-pointed star is mounted at the tip of the tallest pillar, serving as the primary decorative element.
attribute_base_design: The base is circular, bordered by a ring of stones embedded in the ground, with a patch of moss and grass surrounding the obelisk; no steps or additional platforms are present.
attribute_tip_design: The tip of the central pillar is flat and features a metallic five-pointed star, which is simple in design and slightly weathered.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is immediately surrounded by a circular patch of mossy, grassy ground and a ring of stones; no fences, statues, or additional objects are present.
